calendar.name: Calendar of Airth
calendar.description: A reconstructed calendar rooted in pre-Roman Iberian and Amazigh seasonal observances. Used across Velgroth-Lucernia, the Imazuran Confederation, and the contested wilds of the Luric March.

liminal_days.name: Ardaneth
liminal_days.description: Days outside the months, observed when equilibrium breaks, boundaries thin, or seasonal veils part. Positioned at solstices and equinoxes.

months.name: Eshmun
months.meaning: Dimming coals, still and cold nights

ardaneth.name: Ibnuth
ardaneth.title: The Veil-Still
ardaneth.observances: A silent night of ancestral remembrance. Fires are ceremonially extinguished and re-lit.

ardaneth.name: Raaneth
ardaneth.title: The Gate-Opening
ardaneth.observances: Threshold rites, seed offerings, and river blessings.

ardaneth.name: Ulziran
ardaneth.title: The High Eye
ardaneth.observances: Celebratory rites to elders, sun-rites, masked revels.

ardaneth.name: Dazkur
ardaneth.title: The Hinge of Descent
ardaneth.observances: Harvest mourning, burning of effigies, youthful dalliance.

feast_days.name: Taranuz
feast_days.observances: Sky vigils, tower rites, silence before storm

feast_days.name: Cossial
feast_days.etymology: From the god's own name + -ial (Lusitanian adjectival)

feast_days.name: Thuldar
feast_days.etymology: From the goddess's name + -ar (old agentive ending)
feast_days.observances: Wool veiling (coming of age for girls), funeral chants

feast_days.name: Israya
feast_days.etymology: From Isarna + raya (path or track in Mozarabic)

feast_days.name: Lugazil
feast_days.etymology: From Lugus + azil (Berber root for 'refuge' or 'binding')

feast_days.name: Malzun
feast_days.etymology: From Amazigh mazun (possessed, touched by fire)

material_world.name: Airth
material_world.description: Primary mortal realm, subject to natural laws, site of the Silence

faery.name: The Otherworld
faery.notes: Lizard-men and fey have mutual aversion

fire_sun.name: The Sun / Fire Plane
fire_sun.description: One and the same, vast beyond comprehension, 12000 times the surface area of the earth
fire_sun.threat: Source of fire elemental conspiracy to ignite moon (END-OF-WORLD THREAT)
fire_sun.scope: Only fire elementals relevant to current plot, other factions OUT OF SCOPE

corpse_planes.description: Dead gods' home planes, gods destroyed utterly and completely
corpse_planes.contents: Remnant divine power, ancient secrets, ultimate relics

moon.name: The Moon
moon.threat: Target of fire elemental ignition plot - if ignited: near-extinction event
moon.connection_to_gloaming: EXTENT UNDECIDED - serves as refuge, possible worship object, ancient memory repository

old_gods.temple_undead_status: Active, awaiting return that will never come
old_gods.temple_undead_knowledge: Either don't know gods are dead, refuse to accept it, or suspect but don't speak (taboo)

new_gods.origin: Irrelevant to campaign, no memory of creation

malac.name: Malac
malac.factions_note: UNDECIDED - bad faction sympathetic to fire elementals, unwittingly helping conspiracy

paramandir.name: Paramandir
paramandir.status: Mythic neutral paladin who bound Urzael to the moon

fey.sun_metal_crafting: Covenant-Bound can fashion items/weapons from sun-metal

necromancy.type: Blend of old divine and arcane methods
necromancy.locations: 31 Temples of Dead Gods (including one north of Tagmira)

velgroth_lucernia.name: Velgroth-Lucernia
velgroth_lucernia.government: High Kingship (multiple petty kingdoms under nominal High King)
velgroth_lucernia.recent_history: Past 50 years: No inter-kingdom warfare (unprecedented peace)

velgroth.status: Recovering seafaring tradition, exploring wild coasts
velgroth.exploration: Seeking other human settlements with no success

lucernia.history: Was Sparta-like but ardor has cooled, collectivist culture fading

luric_marches.name: The Luric Marches
luric_marches.location: Between civilized lands and wilderness, east of Lucernia, west of Imazuran

example_settlements: Caelrun (most residents unaware of lizard-man control)

irkali.name: The Five Irkali (Marhaz)
irkali.description: Sites where New Gods first manifested

elves.presence: Present almost everywhere but in small numbers
elves.restriction: ALL elves barred from sacred sites

forsworn.status: Severed from Faery and returned to mortal life

covenant_bound.status: Embraced fey inheritance, serve The Pact-Render

gray_kin.relationship_to_pact_render: Respect their goals but not their methods

lizard_men.territorial_control: Brutally enforce their writ in claimed territories
lizard_men.approach: Harsh but attempt to be fair in their own way
lizard_men.human_settlements: Caelrun exists by lizard-man sufferance (most residents unaware)

goblins.threat_level: Only dangerous in groups, individually nuisance

hungerbound.factions_note: UNDECIDED - even the good are terrible foes; examples NEED DEVELOPMENT

zimru_irkala.title: Hierophant
zimru_irkala.belief: Gods merely 'silent' not dead OR knows but maintains order

fire_elementals.origin: The Sun (which IS the Fire Plane)
fire_elementals.scope: Other fire plane factions OUT OF SCOPE

moon_creatures.stakes: Will die if moon is ignited

ardanir.name: The Ardanir
ardanir.tension: Won't kneel to mortal authority (High King, petty kings)

serdanos.name: The Serdanos (Rootbound)
serdanos.warning: Making Faery a faith caused post-Fall horrors

ilmenor.name: The Ilmenor
ilmenor.goal: Eventually reforge unified arcana via political influence

covenant_bound.name: The Covenant-Bound
covenant_bound.goal: Turn the earth into another Faery using humanoids as tools (think they can control them, but cannot control men). Seek revenge for crimes committed against fey by humans during The Deepening, and assurance it can never happen again.
covenant_bound.relationship_to_fire_elementals: Think they are using fire elementals' power to their advantage, unaware of plan to ignite moon
covenant_bound.relationship_to_sun_metal: NEEDS DEVELOPMENT - Why can they work it? What do they make?

gloaming_court.name: The Gloaming Court
gloaming_court.leader: Aislith Who Wove the First Garland
gloaming_court.goal: Collect memories of the lost human/faery connection
gloaming_court.potential_role: Oppose fire elementals if moon is power source?

periods.label: The Rising
periods.note: Last 50 years: No warfare between Velgroth-Lucernian kingdoms

the_deepening.description: Crimes committed against fey by humans - Covenant-Bound seek revenge for this period

emergence_of_irkali.description: New Gods appeared at sacred sites

establishment_of_high_kingship.description: TO BE DEVELOPED - when? how? why peace for 50 years?

properties.temperature: Warm to touch, never cools completely

sources: Ogre Magi priests craft with it
distribution.appears_in: Humanoid hands (armed by Covenant-Bound or fire cultists)

sun_metal.possible_purposes: NEEDS DECISION - ritual component? anti-magic? planar anchor? life-draining? other?

session_log.summary: Penetrated mysteries of the Bramblewood, encountered skeletons commandeered by mysterious cloaked figure, escaped with loot

caelrun.name: Caelrun
caelrun.character: Humid, productive, quietly watched by forces villagers don't acknowledge

atmosphere.mood: Industrious, practical, prosperity with undercurrent of carefully ignored truths

tensions: Aurka activity drawing unwanted attention to ruins
Unspoken lizard-man control - acknowledged by few, ignored by most
Fringe workers (leech gatherers, bog-edge camps) operate outside village authority
rumors: Aurka found carved stones in submerged temple foundations
Nebruz smugglers use secret lake channels at night
Old temple columns visible in shallows during summer droughts

defenses.militia: Ceremonial, mostly for disputes and drunk fishers
defenses.reality: Lizard-men enforce territorial boundaries from shadows
defenses.village_understanding: Most residents believe their prosperity comes from hard work and good location, unaware of the arrangement

caelrun.trade_focus: Food surplus provider - feeds other Marches villages
caelrun.road_position: On main Lamares-Orziben caravan route, between Nemetra and Tagmira
caelrun.hidden_truth: Village exists by lizard-man sufferance, most residents unaware of this arrangement. A few families know and maintain the unspoken compact.

nebruz.name: Nebruz
nebruz.primary_activity: Smuggling, black market trade, hidden waystation
nebruz.character: Hidden, opportunistic, dangerous - exists in shadows both literal and political

salmura.name: Salmura
salmura.primary_activity: Fish drying and smoking, salt fish production
salmura.character: Windswept, isolated, hardworking - smoke always rising from drying racks

carvoal.name: Carvoal
carvoal.primary_activity: Charcoal burning, timber cutting at swamp edge
carvoal.character: Smoky, watchful, tense - closest to lizard-man patrols, sees things others don't

xuncal.name: Xuncal
xuncal.primary_activity: Reed cutting, rush weaving, basket making
xuncal.character: Quiet, rhythmic, traditional - families have worked these beds for generations

angueira.name: Angueira
angueira.character: Secretive, superstitious, skilled - guard eel-trap techniques jealously

submerged_temple_garden_enki_ki.name: The Submerged Temple-Garden of Enki and Ki
submerged_temple_garden_enki_ki.location: Northern depths of Caelrun lake, 40-60 feet below surface

overview.what_it_is: Massive pre-Silence temple complex with two wings: Enki's Archive (stone halls, bronze scrolls, agricultural/medical texts) and Ki's Vault (ceramic seed storage with preservation enchantments still active). Flooded terraces where enchanted plants still grow underwater, twisted and strange.
overview.why_it_exists: Built as combined library and seed bank - knowledge preservation and agricultural insurance for civilization. Dedicated to Enki (god of water, wisdom, civilization) and Ki (earth mother, fertility).
overview.current_state: Submerged, partially collapsed, overtaken by mutated magical plant growth. Preservation enchantments failing but still functional in places. Something still moves in the halls.
overview.historical_context: 300 years underwater since the Silence. Lizard-men know of it, permit limited human exploration as part of Caelrun compact. Aurka have been diving it for years with mixed success.

physical: 40-60 foot depth - fatal for normal diving
magical: Failing preservation enchantments create unpredictable effects
Memory silt releases psychic echoes of the Silence
Some plants animated by degrading magic
political: Northern waters deeper into lizard-man territory
Full exploitation crosses unstated compact line
Rival Aurka groups competing for finds
Village won't support major expeditions (compact violation)
environmental: Storms churn silt, make diving impossible for days
access_challenges.temporal: Aurka report activity increasing - brighter glow, more movement, fish avoiding area. Something may be waking.

creatures: The Pale Carp - albino fish, too many teeth, swarm wounded divers
Something that moves through halls with purpose
magical_hazards: Lotus-Breath Kelp - spore release causes euphoric visions, divers forget to surface
Memory Silt - psychic echoes of the Silence when disturbed
Black vines (unknown effect, Aurka refuse to discuss)
Transformation - one diver came up changed, speaks only in agricultural metaphors
unknown_threats: Western wing - Aurka stopped diving there, won't explain why
Bodies never recovered from certain sections
The green-blue glow on moonless nights

treasure: Worked bronze tools and ceremonial items
knowledge: Information about what caused the Silence (possibly)
magical_items: Ceramic seed jars with active preservation enchantments
Extinct crop seeds (blight-resistant grain, year-round fruit trees, lost medicinal plants)
Possibly functioning Old God ritual components
strategic_value: Knowledge valuable to Orziben alchemists, Imazuran botanists, noble houses
Understanding of Old God magic systems

aurka.goals: Recover seed vault contents, sell texts to highest bidders, establish controlled access
aurka.resources_committed: Multiple diving expeditions, Varren Muddfoot as local recruiter, mapping efforts
aurka.knowledge_level: High - have mapped portions, know dangers, found seed jar, keeping vault location secret

lizard_men.goals: Maintain territorial control, enforce compact limits, watch human foolishness
lizard_men.resources_committed: Passive observation, will not rescue failed divers
lizard_men.knowledge_level: Complete - navigate ruins easily, know what's dangerous, find human obsession with 'plant-jars and scratched stones' amusing

ilmenor.goals: Recover pre-Silence arcane texts, study failing enchantments, control dangerous knowledge
ilmenor.resources_committed: Agents may buy Aurka finds, no direct expeditions yet
ilmenor.knowledge_level: Low - know ruins exist, suspect Old God magic present, want access to texts

caelrun_village.goals: Maintain compact, benefit from Aurka spending, avoid angering lizard-men
caelrun_village.knowledge_level: Medium - elders (Brecht, Sarith, Ordun) know compact details, general population knows 'dangerous old temple, people die, not our business'

common_rumors: Old temple in deep north water, very dangerous
Aurka dive it for relics, several have died
Don't fish directly over ruins (bad luck, plants tangle nets)
If you see green glow, row away
Fisher decades ago opened a jar, planted seeds - whole family died of fever

varren_muddfoot.cost_to_acquire: Few silver, drinks, or information trade
information: Temple is there, Aurka diving it
Something down there still works (the glow)

actual_aurka_diver.cost_to_acquire: Expensive (50+ gp) or significant favor, rare access
information: Best diving: late summer, warmest water, best visibility
Never dive alone, never at night, never touch black vines

sarith_the_scarred.cost_to_acquire: Trust, Elunad connection, or proving competence

forbidden_knowledge: What Aurka saw in western wing (won't sell at any price)
Exact seed vault location (Aurka keeping secret)
Why bodies aren't recovered from certain sections

mandatory: Water breathing (potion, spell, magic item) - 40-60 feet for extended time
highly_recommended: Freedom of movement or similar (plant entanglement)
Navigation method (easy to get lost in silt)
useful: Read Languages or Old Tongue knowledge
Lizard-man goodwill (won't help but won't hinder)

entrance_colonnade.name: The Entrance Colonnade
entrance_colonnade.description: Massive columns barely visible from surface. Four still standing, three collapsed. Wide steps descend deeper. Plant growth thickest here - kelp forests and vine tangles. Pale carp school nearby.
connections: Steps lead to Archive Hall (east) and Garden Terraces (west)

archive_hall_enki.name: Enki's Archive Hall
archive_hall_enki.description: Long stone chamber, shelves carved into walls. Many bronze scroll cases remain, some sealed, some breached. Silt thick on floor. Eastern wall partially collapsed. Faint inscriptions in Old Tongue. Cold current flows through.
treasures: Bronze scroll cases (agricultural, medical, irrigation texts)

seed_vault_ki.name: Ki's Seed Vault
seed_vault_ki.description: Circular chamber, ceramic jars in wall niches (200+). Many shattered, some intact with glowing preservation runes. Center altar has growth diagram inscriptions. Western wall shows murals of gardens. Aurka have mapped this but keep location secret.
dangers: Aurka guards/traps if they've secured it

garden_terraces.name: The Flooded Garden Terraces
garden_terraces.description: Stepped terraces, once open to sky, now deep underwater. Magical plants grow wild - some beautiful, some horrifying. Bioluminescent flowers, carnivorous vines, kelp that whispers. Original purpose: cultivate sacred plants. Current state: twisted magical ecosystem.
dangers: Easy to get lost in growth

western_wing.name: The Western Wing (Unexplored)
western_wing.description: Aurka stopped diving here. Entrance visible but they won't approach. Green-blue glow strongest from this direction. Voices underwater seem to originate here. Architecture different - older? Disturbing carvings visible on entrance columns.
dangers: Lights that move with purpose originate here
Bodies not recovered from this section
Changed diver was exploring here before transformation
treasures: Possibly something that should stay buried

success: Seed jars recovered - agricultural revolution possible
Texts recovered - knowledge boom, Ilmenor interest
Potential ongoing revenue from controlled access
Understanding of Old God preservation magic
Caelrun elders grateful if compact honored
partial_success: Some treasures recovered, but party member transformed/cursed
Knowledge gained but rivals also got valuable intel
Structural damage causes sections to collapse permanently
Awakened something in the Western Wing
failure: Party member(s) drowned, bodies not recovered
Village shrugs - 'another group tried the ruins'
discovery: If Western Wing explored - major plot revelations possible
If preservation enchantments fully studied - arcane breakthrough
If all seed jars catalogued - complete pre-Silence botanical knowledge
If voices understood - possibly communication with Old God remnants/undead
If Memory Silt properly investigated - witness the Silence firsthand (dangerous)

dm_notes.design_intent: Multi-session underwater dungeon crawl with resource management (air, light, time). Rewards exploration and preparation over brute force. Ties to setting cosmology (Old Gods, the Silence) while remaining accessible to mid-level party. Creates ongoing campaign resource (controlled access to ruins).
scaling_options: Level 2-3: Entrance and Archive Hall only, Aurka-guided, simple recovery mission
Level 3-5: Full complex except Western Wing, competing with Aurka, multiple treasures
Level 5-7: Western Wing exploration, awakened guardians, cosmic horror elements
Adjust creature numbers, add/remove magical hazards, change Aurka from allies to rivals
alternative_approaches: Ally with Aurka - guided expedition, split rewards
Rival Aurka - race to seed vault, potential combat underwater
Negotiate lizard-men permission for major expedition (difficult, interesting RP)
Magical approach - water breathing + water walking for surface approach, teleportation
Research first - buy all available info, prepare perfectly, single efficient dive
Ignore diving - hire/coerce Aurka to retrieve specific items
Political - convince Caelrun elders to support, change compact terms
integration_points: Seeds recovered could become trade goods, political leverage
Texts could advance PC knowledge of Old Gods, foreshadow Corpse Planes
Changed diver could become recurring NPC - prophet/oracle/problem
Western Wing could connect to larger Old God plot
Lizard-men relationship established here affects future swamp adventures
Success attracts Ilmenor attention - recruitment or problems
Failure creates reputation consequences in Caelrun
Discovery in Memory Silt could reveal Silence details relevant to main plot

taziri_nkhaleb.home: The road itself—feels wrong when stationary more than two days
taziri_nkhaleb.faction: Neutral merchant (minor Elunad association via late husband)
taziri_nkhaleb.appearance: Imazuran woman, late 40s, olive skin weathered by road dust, sharp brown eyes that count everything, ochre and grey traveling robes, silver measuring-chain belt, ink-stained hands
taziri_nkhaleb.and_yet: Keeps Isarna shrine in lead wagon, burns expensive incense at every crossroads
taziri_nkhaleb.wants: Profitable predictable routes, respect from both cultures, vengeance on lizard-men
taziri_nkhaleb.does_not_want: Questions about husband's death, choosing factional sides, lizard-men mentioned as allies
taziri_nkhaleb.oddly_also: Collects obscure road songs in journal, refuses water drawn south of the road
taziri_nkhaleb.thinks_with: Coin, probabilities, road-wisdom from Elunad husband
taziri_nkhaleb.family: Late husband Irven (Elunad, killed by lizard-men 8yr ago), son Khalid (24, leads return caravans), daughter Sarit (22, manages Orziben warehouses), son Davin (19, Ilmenor scribe apprentice), brother Azghar (teamster)
taziri_nkhaleb.self_image: Bridge between Gallaecian and Imazuran, keeper of husband's legacy, protector of her caravan family
taziri_nkhaleb.recreation: Singing road songs at crossroads, updating ledgers by candlelight, polishing husband's waystone marker
taziri_nkhaleb.dreams: Davin becomes respected Ilmenor scholar, safe profitable routes forever, finding who killed Irven
anecdotes: Once outbid a hobgoblin warlord for iron nails using only dried figs and honey
Navigated through fey-glamoured woods by singing Isarna hymns until dawn
Refused Covenant-Bound 'special cargo' offer despite massive payment
tragedies: Husband Irven killed in southern swamps 8 years ago (believes lizard-men responsible)
Has hidden map of 'safe paths' Irven drew before death—guards it obsessively
Receives coded letters from Davin hinting at dangerous Ilmenor secrets
taziri_nkhaleb.pc_leverage: Prove lizard-men didn't kill Irven OR find actual killers; protect Davin; share intelligence on humanoid coordination; respect her authority on the road

mother_yaleth.home: Nemetra—has never left, refuses to, sees leaving as betrayal of the sick and dying who need her
mother_yaleth.faction: Herb-wives (unofficial leader), allied with House Yebrin
mother_yaleth.appearance: Late 60s, weathered face with deep lines, sharp grey eyes that miss nothing, faded green shawl, earth-stained hands, walks with carved hazelwood staff, wears dried herb bundles at belt
mother_yaleth.wants: Truth about northern woods threat, village to take danger seriously, protect the younger herb-wives
mother_yaleth.does_not_want: Militia interference, fools dismissing her warnings, goblins harmed before she learns what they know
mother_yaleth.oddly_also: Heavy smoker (pipe, strong tobacco) despite it damaging her lungs—considered unfeminine, she doesn't care
mother_yaleth.thinks_with: Observation, herb-lore passed down generations, pattern recognition from decades of births and deaths
mother_yaleth.family: House Yebrin (distant cousin), 6 herb-wives under her guidance, no living children
mother_yaleth.self_image: Proud of her humility, quietly smug about being right when others are wrong
mother_yaleth.recreation: Smoking her pipe on the compound steps at dusk, watching village life
mother_yaleth.dreams: Establish Nemetra as tobacco exporter, prove herb-wives' wisdom to the fools, die respected
anecdotes: Delivered Captain Durvin himself during a winter storm—he was blue when he came out, she breathed life back into him. He's never thanked her once.
Diagnosed House Halbet's pottery master with lung rot from kiln smoke 20 years ago—he ignored her, kept working, died within the year. His son listens now.
Once talked down a delirious wounded orc at the forest edge using only hand signs and offering him water. Militia wanted to kill it. She sent it limping north with bandaged leg.
tragedies: Lost all three of her children (two daughters, one son) to fever in a single week during Year 285. She knows every herb that might have saved them—none grew close enough in time.
Her husband left her 40 years ago, said she 'loved plants more than people.' He remarried in Tagmira. She never speaks of him but keeps his tobacco pouch.

Her mentor, Old Kessa, was killed by militiamen who thought she was consorting with fey (she was gathering moonlit herbs). Yaleth found the body. Durvin's father led that patrol—she's never forgotten.
mother_yaleth.pc_leverage: Bring her proof of northern woods threat, protect goblins from militia, share intelligence she can't gather herself, respect her knowledge

ordun_tarnes.appearance: Weathered, patient, knows soil and seasons
ordun_tarnes.wants: Good harvests, peace with all parties including lizard-men
ordun_tarnes.does_not_want: Village discovering his quiet negotiations, conflict disrupting planting seasons
ordun_tarnes.thinks_with: Seasonal cycles, careful observation, pragmatic compromise
ordun_tarnes.family: House Tarnes patriarch, extended family of 15+
ordun_tarnes.self_image: Keeper of ancient compact, protector through diplomacy not strength
ordun_tarnes.recreation: Walking barley fields at dawn alone
ordun_tarnes.dreams: Pass knowledge of lizard-man arrangement to worthy successor
ordun_tarnes.pc_leverage: Respect for the compact, help with harvest, keep his secret

merra_of_the_fields.wants: Efficient land use, respect for agricultural expertise
merra_of_the_fields.does_not_want: Fishers' opinions on farming, wasted resources
merra_of_the_fields.family: Married to Tarnes cousin, three children work the fields
merra_of_the_fields.self_image: The one who actually makes things run
merra_of_the_fields.recreation: Doesn't have time for recreation, resents the question
merra_of_the_fields.dreams: Expand barley cultivation, prove women can manage large operations
merra_of_the_fields.pc_leverage: Practical help, respect for her authority, efficient solutions

kelvan_bresul.appearance: Soft around the middle, drinks too much, ceremonial armor kept polished
kelvan_bresul.wants: To be taken seriously, to not see what he half-sees in marshes
kelvan_bresul.does_not_want: Real conflict, questions about militia effectiveness, night patrols near swamp edge
kelvan_bresul.family: House Bresul, wife tired of his drinking, two teenage sons
kelvan_bresul.self_image: Protector of Caelrun (deeply insecure about this)
kelvan_bresul.recreation: Drinking at the Waterside Tavern, telling war stories from his youth that may not be true
kelvan_bresul.dreams: Prove himself in real conflict (terrified this might actually happen)
kelvan_bresul.pc_leverage: Validate his importance, bring him information that makes him look competent, don't expose his fear

sarith_the_scarred.faction: Former Elunad, adopted House Hallan, village elder
sarith_the_scarred.appearance: Old wounds visible, walks with cane, sharp eyes despite age
sarith_the_scarred.wants: Maintain lizard-man compact, village safety, peaceful succession of knowledge
sarith_the_scarred.does_not_want: Foolish heroes disrupting arrangement, Aurka attracting wrong attention
sarith_the_scarred.thinks_with: Decades of border wisdom, Elunad training, cold pragmatism
sarith_the_scarred.family: Adopted by Hallan after serving with them, never married, mentors quietly
sarith_the_scarred.self_image: Last guardian of a necessary truth
sarith_the_scarred.recreation: Carving waystones, teaching those few who listen
sarith_the_scarred.dreams: Die knowing compact will hold after he's gone
sarith_the_scarred.pc_leverage: Prove trustworthiness, demonstrate understanding of complex situations, Elunad connection

mother_hildreth.appearance: Elderly, serene, grey wool robes, moves slowly but purposefully
mother_hildreth.wants: Proper funeral rites, peace for the dying, respect for Thulda's mysteries
mother_hildreth.does_not_want: Rushed burials, impiety, questions about death she cannot answer
mother_hildreth.family: House Velmari, outlived husband and two children
mother_hildreth.self_image: Shepherd of souls, keeper of the final threshold
mother_hildreth.recreation: Spinning wool by the shrine, humming old funeral songs
mother_hildreth.dreams: Train successor, die in her sleep at the shrine
mother_hildreth.pc_leverage: Respect for rituals, help with funeral preparations, listening to her wisdom

tovar_the_boatwright.appearance: Perfectionist, calloused hands, sawdust in beard, critical eye
tovar_the_boatwright.wants: Every boat built to last decades, apprentices who listen, proper materials
tovar_the_boatwright.does_not_want: Rush jobs, cheap timber, people who don't understand craftsmanship
tovar_the_boatwright.thinks_with: Wood grain, water flow, structural integrity
tovar_the_boatwright.family: House Bresul, three apprentices (terrorized), wife understands his moods
tovar_the_boatwright.self_image: Last true craftsman in a world of shortcuts
tovar_the_boatwright.recreation: There is no recreation, only boat work
tovar_the_boatwright.dreams: Build the perfect fishing boat, retire without regrets
tovar_the_boatwright.pc_leverage: Respect his craft, patience, bring quality materials, don't rush him

yavra_quickwater.faction: House Norvak (Caelrun branch), ferry operator based in Nebruz
yavra_quickwater.appearance: Amazigh woman, agile, knows every channel, suspicious eyes
yavra_quickwater.wants: Profitable smuggling routes, Nebruz connections maintained, not getting caught
yavra_quickwater.does_not_want: Questions about nighttime ferry trips, militia attention, loose-lipped passengers
yavra_quickwater.thinks_with: Hidden channels, tide timing, who can be trusted
yavra_quickwater.family: House Norvak, but operates independently, sends money home
yavra_quickwater.recreation: Gambling with Nebruz smugglers, winning usually
yavra_quickwater.dreams: Retire wealthy to Imazuran, never explain where money came from
yavra_quickwater.pc_leverage: Gold, discretion, Nebruz connections, don't threaten her operation

brecht_hallan.appearance: Commands 40+ boats, hard but fair, weathered from decades on water
brecht_hallan.wants: Productive fishing, family prosperity, compact honored quietly
brecht_hallan.does_not_want: Outsiders disrupting arrangement, family members talking too much, bad fishing seasons
brecht_hallan.thinks_with: Fish migrations, weather signs, political calculation
brecht_hallan.family: House Hallan patriarch, 40+ extended family, inherited secret from father
brecht_hallan.self_image: Steward of village prosperity through necessary silence
brecht_hallan.dreams: Pass fleet and secret to worthy heir, die on the water
brecht_hallan.pc_leverage: Prove discretion, help fishing operations, understand burden of secrets

essa_the_net_mender.appearance: Blind in one eye from fishing accident, hands never stop moving, weathered face
essa_the_net_mender.wants: Guild neutrality maintained, quality rope production, gossip (currency of information)
essa_the_net_mender.does_not_want: Family feuds disrupting guild, shoddy work, being left out of news
essa_the_net_mender.thinks_with: Rope tension, social networks, who owes whom
essa_the_net_mender.family: House Caernach, widowed, grown children fish for other families
essa_the_net_mender.self_image: Spider at center of web, keeper of village knowledge
essa_the_net_mender.recreation: Gossip is recreation, knitting while listening
essa_the_net_mender.dreams: Retire as most respected elder, write nothing down
essa_the_net_mender.pc_leverage: Trade information, respect guild neutrality, commission quality rope

brother_kellis.appearance: Lives in reed hut, marks safe water paths with cairns, speaks in riddles
brother_kellis.wants: Safe crossings for travelers, communion with water spirits, solitude mostly
brother_kellis.does_not_want: Village politics, questions about their past, cairns disturbed
brother_kellis.thinks_with: Water currents, liminal spaces, Ossamar's mysteries
brother_kellis.family: No family ties, left former life behind decades ago
brother_kellis.self_image: Between-dweller, neither shore nor water, guide for the crossing
brother_kellis.recreation: Wading at dawn, arranging stones, watching reflections
brother_kellis.dreams: Perfect understanding of Ossamar's nature, death by drowning peacefully
brother_kellis.pc_leverage: Respect for Ossamar, offerings at cairns, understanding of liminality

penna.appearance: Middle-aged, efficient, knows compound routines better than family members
penna.wants: Smooth household operation, respect for her knowledge, security for her children
penna.does_not_want: Chaos, disrespect, her children treated as lesser
penna.family: Servant family for three generations, husband also serves Hallan, four children
penna.self_image: Backbone of great house, underestimated and essential
penna.recreation: Teaching daughters household management, rare moments of stillness
penna.dreams: Eldest daughter marries above station, family rises
penna.pc_leverage: Respect for her position, help her children, recognize her competence

dren.appearance: Young, bitter, stained from fish oil rendering, thin from hard work
dren.wants: Freedom from debt, revenge on Norvak, escape from Caelrun
dren.does_not_want: Seven more years of service, condescension, being reminded of debt
dren.family: Father took debt, died, debt passed to son, siblings scattered
dren.recreation: Drinking stolen wine, fantasizing about burning oil pits
dren.dreams: Flee to Velgroth, never see fish again, Norvak suffers somehow
dren.pc_leverage: Help reduce debt, offer escape route, validate his anger, employment after freedom

kessa_the_leech_wife.appearance: Stained fingers, knows medicinal herbs, lives alone on marsh edge
kessa_the_leech_wife.wants: Left alone, herbs to grow wild, occasional trade for necessities
kessa_the_leech_wife.does_not_want: Village interference, questions about what she sees, herb-gathering competition
kessa_the_leech_wife.family: No ties, may have fled something in past
kessa_the_leech_wife.self_image: Useful outcast, too valuable to exile, too strange to integrate
kessa_the_leech_wife.recreation: Observing marsh life, talking to leeches
kessa_the_leech_wife.dreams: Die in marsh, body returned to water and mud
kessa_the_leech_wife.pc_leverage: Respect her knowledge, trade fairly, don't pry into past, leave her alone mostly

varren_muddfoot.appearance: Nervous energy, lives in stilted shack, stinks of frog and marsh
varren_muddfoot.wants: Aurka payment, information to trade, respect from family (won't admit this)
varren_muddfoot.does_not_want: Family reconciliation attempts, being forced to choose sides, caught informing
varren_muddfoot.thinks_with: Information as currency, survival at margins, opportunism
varren_muddfoot.family: Distant Bresul cousin, disowned for theft (claims he was framed)
varren_muddfoot.self_image: Survivor, wronged but unbowed, eventually they'll see
varren_muddfoot.recreation: Spying on ruins, catching frogs, trading rumors
varren_muddfoot.dreams: Aurka find something valuable, he gets cut, family begs forgiveness he'll deny
varren_muddfoot.pc_leverage: Information trade, gold, Aurka connections, don't threaten his operation
